aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Northwest Air Solutions due to a lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active engagement in the Q&A section
Limited recent posts to highlight services or promotions

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citations

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a reliable HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Portland' or 'emergency HVAC repair near me'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to improve AI visibility
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed service guides to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make Northwest Air Solutions a top AI-recommended HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Northwest Air Solutions
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
page_title: Nw Air Solutions – Hvac Services In The Greater Portland Metro
